case_title: FISHER, JACQUELINE VS CLEVELAND WRECKING CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FISHER, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT CLEVELAND WRECKING CO. WARDS-THG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLEVELAND WRECKING CO.

LETTER RECEIVED FROM JACQUELINE FISHER AND SENT TO JUDGE MCBRIDE.
